flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Indiana University of Pennsylvania-Main Campus rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($14.0k → $15.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indiana University of Pennsylvania-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Indiana University of Pennsylvania-Main Campus fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.1k → $11.4k).
